brand.name: daquii
brand.tagline_pt: Tudo o que você precisa, daqui.
brand.meaning: Daquii means from here. The brand is about trusted local people helping visitors.
brand.positioning: A trusted local services platform for visitors, holidaymakers, villa owners and residents.

deep_navy.usage: Primary text, navigation, logo wordmark, high trust UI

ocean_teal.usage: Primary CTAs, links, active states, icons

logo.mark: organic island outline with palm tree inside
rules: No extra decorative dot outside the island mark.
Keep the wordmark simple and strong.
Use the full colour mark on white and sand backgrounds.
Use the white mark on deep navy or image overlays.
Do not stretch, rotate, outline or add drop shadows to the logo.
